_doc: Char-count baseline for each LLM-facing payload. PromptSizeProbeTest derives ceiling as chars × 1.15 in code; there is no manual ceiling here. On growth past ceiling: trim the prompt. On shrinkage below 'chars': run `bazel run //src/test:update_prompt_baselines` to rewrite this file, then commit. Each entry carries 'updatedBy' (PR or issue ref) and 'reason' for audit trail; the updater stamps 'auto' / dated 'regenerated' when an entry changes, leaving you to refine those fields before committing.

contractPrompt.reason: Deleted decision_kinds.jinja include; its recognition heuristics (INCLUSIVE/PARALLEL keywords + differentiator + anti-pattern) folded into FlatContractDecision.kind's @JsonPropertyDescription so they still ship via the schema.

contractFullPayload.reason: Net of the decision_kinds fold: -1023 prompt, +445 schema (heuristics relocated into FlatContractDecision.kind description); ~578 net full-payload saving, no steering lost.

generationPrompt.reason: Migrated the parallel-join + inclusive-default worked examples from inline template JSON to typed Creating.withExample(...). The examples still ship (as prompt contributors, verified in BpmnGeneratorAgentTest) but sit outside this template-render probe by design — they're typed code, not free-text prompt drift.

generationFullPayload.reason: Tracks generationPrompt; the withExample few-shot examples are not part of render()+schema so are not measured here (see generationPrompt note).

alignmentPrompt.reason: Removed Output-shape (AlignmentFindings) prose block and classification enum listing (now carried by @JsonClassDescription / @JsonPropertyDescription). Cut worked examples from 2 to 1 (kept misaligned).

alignmentFullPayload.reason: BpmnRequest.contribution() scoped to style-guide-only; ~1.8k chars of generation rules no longer ship on the alignment call.

readinessPrompt.reason: Removed `dimensions` and `missingAreas` enum listings; their canonical names reach the LLM via the JSON-schema enum values. Kept the per-dimension calibration paragraph (load-bearing guidance).

readinessFullPayload.reason: BpmnRequest.contribution() scoped to style-guide-only; ~1.8k chars of generation rules no longer ship on the readiness call.

repairPatchPrompt.reason: bpmner/repair/patch_feedback.jinja rendered via BpmnRepairPromptFactory.patchFeedback with one canonical ERROR-severity diagnostic.

repairFullPrompt.reason: bpmner/repair/full_feedback.jinja rendered via BpmnRepairPromptFactory.fullRepairFeedback with one canonical ERROR-severity diagnostic and the sample definition.
